title: Lebanese army says troops deploying in 'pilot zone' after Israeli withdrawal
summary_full: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
summary_public: A US-brokered agreement should see Israeli troops pulling out of a small part of Lebanon occupied during their conflict with Hezbollah.
